LanguageData.AE_Loot_Corpses_Rare: Wow, it seems you were lucky enough to find some treasure left by the people who died here.
LanguageData.AE_LootBox_Message_Survivor: A person emerged from the corpse.
LanguageData.AE_Survivor_Text_First: You found a "human" in the corpse and you can't help but notice insect characteristics on {Interviewee_objective}.
LanguageData.AE_Survivor_Text_Survival: "I am {Interviewee_nameDef}. I was captured by a swarm of insects during a wave. To be honest, I don't know why they only didn't kill me. When I woke up, my body was like this. I've got nowhere to go now, please let me join you."
LanguageData.AE_Survivor_WelcomeAE_Survivor_Attack: It must be a new type of Insect! It must be annihilated!
